about.label: About
about.title: Senior Developer from Magdeburg
about.body1: Since 2011 I've combined professional software development in large enterprises with a passion for building digital products. Over more than a decade I've followed Angular from its early days to the modern Signals era.
about.body2: Beyond frontend expertise I bring deep DevOps knowledge: container orchestration, CI/CD pipelines, and cloud infrastructure. Today I accelerate my workflow through targeted use of AI tools.

ai.label: AI Workflow
ai.title: How I integrate AI into my daily work
ai.subtitle: AI is not a buzzword — it's my daily accelerator.
ai.copilot_desc: Code completion, inline chat and refactoring right in the editor. Reduces boilerplate and speeds up exploring new Angular APIs.
ai.claude_desc: Architecture decisions, code reviews and complex refactorings. Ideal for large context windows and structured outputs.
ai.cicd_desc: Automated PR summaries, test generation and dependency analysis directly in the pipeline with GitHub Actions.
ai.review_desc: Proactive security and performance checks through AI-powered static analysis — before the first human review.

contact.label: Contact
contact.title: Let's talk
contact.subtitle: I'm open to interesting projects, consulting, or simply a professional conversation.
